REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ISABELL, MARILYN JANE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-04-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-04-2022 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF MARILYN JANE ISABELL IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MERCY HOUSING CALIFORNIA IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY JOHN RYAN, REGIONAL DIRECTOR, & VICTOR CHEN, PROPERTY MANAGER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ISABELL, MARILYN JANE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MERCY HOUSING CALIFORNIA $800.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $800.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
